title: 15 Pieces 22CM Christmas Flowers Artificial Poinsettia Flowers Xmas Tree Ornaments with Clips Stems for Wreath Party Wedding New Year Decoration (Red)
features: 15 Pack Christmas Flowers: Each poinsettia flower size is approximate 22 cm / 8.7 inches in diameter. The Christmas flowers comes with clips and stems. You can easily attach them to Christmas tree, Christmas wreath or garlands. The artificial poinsettia flowers are flat and not easily deformed

Create Christmas Atmosphere: The Christmas tree flowers ornaments is designed for decorating your Xmas tree with poinsettia flower ornaments, which will absolutely create cheerful Christmas atmosphere

Nice Christmas Decorations: Great for your Christmas Tree decoration, House decor, Christmas wreath and other Christmas decorations. The poinsettia ornaments also can be applied to holiday party wedding, birthday party, New Year or other festival decoration, they will highlight your party and make you and your guests more joyful to enjoy the festival
High Quality Material: These poinsettia Christmas decorations flowers are made from high quality cloth and plastic, lightweight and easy to carry and store

Xmas Tree Ornaments: The Christmas flowers ornaments are made of flexible and non-breakable material, can be applied to anywhere you want, which make the tree more attractive and add more holiday atmosphere
description: Product Description Note: 1. Due to transport reasons, may cause some flowers slightly deformed, you can use the hair dryer hot air blow the flowers back to the ideal shape. 2. It might have smell when you open the package. Just air it out for 1-2 days. The smell would go away. Christmas tree decoration Christmas wreath / garland decoration Stair banisters decoration Christmas packaging box decoration Porch decoration Fireplace decoration
